---
title: "Innovations"
---

## Google Earth Engine Apps

::: {.software-grid}
::: {.software-card}
![Spectral Curve](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Spectral+Reflectance+Curve)
### Spectral Reflectance Curve
A tool for analyzing spectral signatures across multiple bands.
[Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral)
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Phenology signature](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Phenology+Signature)
### Phenology Signature
Crop classification tool based on phenological signatures.
[Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature)
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Flood Susceptibility](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Flood+Susceptibility+AHP)
### Flood Susceptibility
AHP-based tool for flood susceptibility mapping.
[Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/floodsusceptibility)
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Odisha Flood Map](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Odisha+Flood+Map)
### Odisha Flood Map
Real-time flood mapping tool for the Odisha region.
[Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/odishaflood)
:::
:::

## Python Packages

::: {.software-grid}
::: {.software-card}
![geeadvance](https://placehold.co/400x200/27ae60/ffffff?text=geeadvance+Package)
### geeadvance
Advanced functional tools for Google Earth Engine.
[PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/geeadvance/)
:::

::: {.software-card}
![deepgee](https://placehold.co/400x200/27ae60/ffffff?text=deepgee+Package)
### deepgee
Seamless integration of Deep Learning with Earth Engine.
[PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/deepgee/)
:::

::: {.software-card}
![geeassist](images/geeai.jpg)
### geeassist
AI-powered coding assistant for the GEE playground.
[PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/geeassist/)
:::
:::

## Chrome Extensions

::: {.software-grid}
::: {.software-card}
![GEE AI Assistant](images/geeai.jpg)
### GEE AI Assistant
Enhance your GEE development with Gemini-powered AI.
[Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/gee-ai-assistant/kldhacnbicjpbdiebjjflnhgcmheokkl)
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Quick Screenshot](https://placehold.co/400x200/e67e22/ffffff?text=Quick+Screenshot)
### Quick Screenshot
Capture and annotate screenshots directly in your browser.
[Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/koeblknkgkpklkpcbfigakkfnhkkadnm)
:::
:::
